transcript.text: Hello, Living in Lafayette Vlog with Kyle, the 31st of May, 2013, last day of the month.
I was up pretty late last night, probably like 2 or something working because I was trying to, I was just redoing the, you know, prehistory pages.
Just the layout and the links and everything. And I don't think I'm done.
And then I crashed and I went to sleep.
But I was so like wired and I didn't, I felt like I would be up all night. So I popped a Unisom sleeping pill.
Oh my God. And I got up at like noon today and I was like, I was like out of it.
And I think I was dreaming last night, but I got up and I was like, what's wrong with me?
And then I remembered about that pill. And sometimes when I take those pills, oh my God, it shuts me down.
And I got to remember to not take any more of those. I mean, I'm still like that now. I'm out of it.
I'm like more inebriated now than, and I took it like 12 hours ago or 13, 14 hours ago.
And I'm still totally like, like I just smoked weed for 20 minutes. Crazy.
Crazy. Anyway, so when I got up, oh, I went over to the, you get the free food.
Kind of felt like a welfare leech doing that, but you just go and pick it up.
And I don't have a job, so I might as well, plus I'm doing the timeline.
So it's like, I deserve it. I totally deserve it. I work all day already on this.
So then I came back and I've been doing this. I actually went to the supermarket and I got, I rented Last Stand with Schwarzenegger.
I might watch that tonight. I'm not going to ride my bike today either.
I didn't yesterday and I won today. I'm starting to feel, get frustrated, feel like I'm just behind on this timeline.
It's taking forever to fix the links and everything and standardize the CSS, you know, and make it all standard.
It's taking forever and I just don't want to do anything other than work.
And I don't really have the energy anyways because that's simple.
So, so yeah, I'm, I'm, I'm adding the meta tags to BC pages.
I thought I already did, but apparently I didn't.
And I'm fixing links too.
Thought I fixed all those.
Apparently I didn't.
So, so yeah, that's my life.
Just fixing links and adding meta tags.
And then I think I'm done and then I go and I see you and I'm only halfway done.

When you do that, when I do this stuff like methodically, when I open all the pages up in a certain folder and then I do, and I paste everything on there all the same, you would think that you'd be done.
But then when you click it, you're only half done.
So it's bizarre.
I don't know if there's internet goblins or whatever, but I know that I'm pretty sure that if I keep moving forward and I keep doing it, I'll eventually be done.
So, so this is my life.
This is my life now.
Hopefully I'll be done fixing links and then I'll do the demo page of it.
So, but I don't know how long that's going to be.
I'm not even going to try to make a prediction anymore.
So that's my life.
And that's my feel life for the day.
